mnemonics: CLEVER Vectors: Characteristic Equation Leads to EigenValues, EigenVectors - Revealing Transformation Secrets
keyPoints: The characteristic equation (det(A - λI) = 0) must be solved to find eigenvalues
For each eigenvalue, the null space of (A - λI) gives its corresponding eigenvectors
Eigenvectors form the basis for understanding linear transformations and diagonalization
commonMistakes: Forgetting to subtract λ from the diagonal entries when forming (A - λI)
Assuming algebraic multiplicity equals geometric multiplicity for all matrices
Mixing up eigenvalues when finding their corresponding eigenvectors
